disclosures.name: TestEqual
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the managed runtime allocates during the converted Equal comparison loop where Go's compiler-optimized code does not; a malloc-counting shim would fail identically

disclosures.name: TestGrow
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the converted Buffer.Grow/Write path allocates in the managed slice model where Go's pre-grown buffer writes allocation-free

disclosures.name: TestIndex
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the converted Index search allocates in the managed runtime where Go's compiler stack-allocates its working state

disclosures.name: TestIndexRune
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: string(r) materializes a byte[] in the managed model where Go uses a 4-byte stack buffer (runtime.intstring)

disclosures.name: TestLastIndex
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the converted LastIndex search allocates in the managed runtime where Go's compiler stack-allocates its working state

disclosures.name: TestNewBufferShallow
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the addressed Buffer copy heap-boxes per run in the managed model (ref var through the heap) where Go's escape analysis keeps the shallow copy on the stack

disclosures.name: TestWriteAppend
disclosures.reason: want-zero AllocsPerRun assert: the converted AvailableBuffer/AppendInt/Write loop allocates in the managed slice model where Go's sufficiently-sized buffer appends allocation-free
